LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: .NET Framework-specific APIs have no direct equivalent or require different hosting/runtime models in .NET 10.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Extraction may fail at runtime and block deployment to modern service hosts.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Replace APIs with .NET cross-platform alternatives and add compatibility wrappers where needed.

LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: Direct HttpContext access leaks transport concerns into domain/application layers.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Porting to microservices requires extensive rewiring of request-scoped context logic.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Introduce request context interfaces and move HttpContext access to edge adapters/controllers.

LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: Legacy DI container composition roots are often framework-specific and globally coupled.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Service bootstrapping for .NET 10 microservices becomes risky and error-prone.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Move registrations to Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection-compatible modules and remove static container access.

LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: Razor rendering dependencies indicate mixed UI and business logic.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Service extraction is delayed because rendering concerns do not belong to domain services.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Split rendering from business flow and expose API contracts before extraction.

LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: Global mutable state creates hidden dependencies and thread-safety risks.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Service boundary isolation and independent scaling are compromised.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Refactor to explicit dependency injection, remove global state, and model context per request/workflow.

LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: System.Web pipeline abstractions are tightly coupled to classic ASP.NET hosting.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Direct extraction to ASP.NET Core/.NET 10 is blocked until host pipeline concerns are isolated.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Encapsulate System.Web usages behind adapter interfaces and migrate endpoint surface to ASP.NET Core abstractions first.

LegacyRiskDetails.WhyRisky: Shared configuration access patterns create hidden coupling across domains.
LegacyRiskDetails.MigrationImpact: Extracted services cannot evolve configuration independently.
LegacyRiskDetails.RecommendedRemediation: Introduce bounded, versioned config contracts and isolate per-service settings.
